What We Build

From single automations to full AI infrastructure. Choose your level.

⚡

n8n Automation Flows

From €500/flow

Custom workflow design & implementation. Connect 400+ apps, automate repetitive tasks, self-hosted so you own everything.

  • ✓ Custom workflow design
  • ✓ 400+ app integrations
  • ✓ Self-hosted on your infra
  • ✓ Documentation included
Get Started
🤖

AI Agent Development

From €2,000/agent

Custom AI agents built for your business. Unique personality, trained on your knowledge base, integrated with your tools.

  • ✓ Custom personality & behavior
  • ✓ Knowledge base training
  • ✓ Tool & API integrations
  • ✓ Autonomous operation
Get Started
💡

AI Consulting

€150/hour

Strategy sessions for AI adoption. Get expert guidance on which tools, models, and architectures fit your business.

  • ✓ AI readiness assessment
  • ✓ Stack recommendations
  • ✓ ROI projections
  • ✓ Implementation roadmap
Get Started
🏗️

Full AI Infrastructure

Custom pricing

Complete setup: agents + automations + monitoring + training. Everything you need to run AI-powered operations.

  • ✓ End-to-end setup
  • ✓ Multiple agents & flows
  • ✓ Team training & docs
  • ✓ 3-month support included
